ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company operates in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "ipo_year" INTEGER /* Year the company went public (IPO) */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public (IPO) */,
  "founder" TEXT /* Founder of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Current CEO of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters address of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "stock_exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "last_sale" REAL /* Last sale price of the stock */,
  "net_change" REAL /* Net change in the stock price */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the stock price entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("stock_exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "stock_exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "stock_exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stock exchange is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial data belongs to */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "cash" REAL /* Cash and cash equivalents of the company */,
  "debt" REAL /* Total debt of the company */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the financial data is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (analyst, portfolio manager, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_companies" (
  "portfolio_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio company */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the company belongs to */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_companies_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_companies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
